title: schedonorus procerus
intro: Schedonorus procerus, also known as blue oat grass, is a species of grass native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Schedonorus procerus lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic, which can help to relieve urinary tract issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Schedonorus procerus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
